title: SWIMMING LOCATIONS - 211info
text: HOOD RIVER AQUATIC CENTER SWIMMING LOCATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a public swimming space. 1601 May Steet Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Center: Monday-Friday 8am-7pm, Saturday-Sunday 8am-5pm Open Swim: Monday-Friday 1pm--5pm, Friday 5:30pm-7pm, Saturday 1pm-5pm (541) 386-1303 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 386-1303 Aquatic Center INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information including details about the out of district, multi-use pass, or special use pass. FEES: In district day rate: Ages 3-17 and 60 and older: $4 Ages 18-59: $5 Family day pass: $13.50 DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Hood River County Services: Extreme Heat Swimming Facilities If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HOOD RIVER AQUATIC CENTER
